data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditable history.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Auditable history without relying on app-only reconstruction'. However, the evidence provided does not include specific details or records that confirm the existence of an auditable history. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that it is implemented or functioning as required, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Auditable history records are not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditable history requirement.
